title: Implement fab_extract_knowledge MCP tool + service with idempotency and event emission
description: Author packages/server/src/services/extract-knowledge.ts (pure async function) and packages/server/src/tools/extract-knowledge.ts (MCP registration), wire into createFabricServer at index.ts:108-109. Service writes proposed knowledge entries to .fabric/knowledge/pending/<type>/<slug>.md (no id frontmatter — Q2 late-bind), emits knowledge_proposed event (or knowledge_archive_attempted on validation failure / empty extraction), and computes idempotency_key = sha256({source_session, type, slug}). Repeat-call dedup: same idempotency_key reuses existing pending_path and appends to evidence section rather than overwriting body.

files.change: New service: build pending_path .fabric/knowledge/pending/${type}/${sanitizeSlug(slug)}.md, derive idempotency_key via sha256({source_session, type, slug}), ensureParentDirectory, check existing path; if exists with same key append evidence section else atomicWriteText fresh frontmatter (type/maturity:'draft'/layer:'team'/created_at/source_session/tags:[]) — NO id field. appendEventLedgerEvent({event_type:'knowledge_proposed', timestamp:new Date().toISOString(), correlation_id:source_session, session_id:source_session, reason:`extract_knowledge:${slug}`}) inside best-effort try/catch. On validation/empty input emit knowledge_archive_attempted instead. Return {pending_path: workspace-relative, idempotency_key}.

Clone packages/server/src/tools/plan-context.ts:1-72 verbatim. Swap schema imports to FabExtractKnowledgeInputSchema/OutputSchema/fabExtractKnowledgeAnnotations, swap tool name to 'fab_extract_knowledge', swap service import to extract-knowledge.js. Drop ensureRulesFresh call (extract-knowledge does not depend on rule index freshness). Keep tracker.enter/exit, resolveProjectRoot, enforcePayloadLimit guard, structuredContent return shape.

Add `import { registerExtractKnowledge } from './tools/extract-knowledge.js';` next to existing tool imports (L15-16). Inside createFabricServer (L102-143), add `registerExtractKnowledge(server, tracker);` line at L108-109 after registerRuleSections. Optionally also `export { extractKnowledge } from './services/extract-knowledge.js';` near KnowledgeIdAllocator export (L40-49).

Mirror packages/server/src/services/plan-context.test.ts shape: tempDirs[] + mkdtemp afterEach cleanup, createTempProject helper. Tests: (1) basic write — call extractKnowledge once, assert pending file exists with correct frontmatter (no id field), assert knowledge_proposed event in events.jsonl. (2) idempotency — call twice with same (source_session,type,slug), assert second call returns same idempotency_key + same pending_path; assert events.jsonl has 2 knowledge_proposed events but pending file body is augmented (evidence-append) not duplicated. (3) empty extraction — call with empty user_messages_summary, assert knowledge_archive_attempted event emitted instead of knowledge_proposed. (4) slug sanitization — pass slug with spaces/special chars, assert pending_path uses kebab-case sanitized form.

implementation: Read packages/server/src/services/_shared.ts to confirm sha256 + ensureParentDirectory exports

Author services/extract-knowledge.ts: signature `async function extractKnowledge(projectRoot: string, input: FabExtractKnowledgeInput): Promise<FabExtractKnowledgeOutput>` with sanitizeSlug helper (kebab-case, lowercase, alphanumeric-and-dash only, max 40 chars)

Implement idempotency: sha256 hash of {source_session, type, slug} via _shared.sha256; if pending file exists check x-fabric-idempotency-key frontmatter field — if matches, append evidence section under heading `## Evidence (call N)` else write fresh

Implement event emission inside best-effort try/catch (mirror plan-context.ts:134-151) — knowledge_proposed on success, knowledge_archive_attempted on empty user_messages_summary or validation failure
Author tools/extract-knowledge.ts cloned from plan-context.ts pattern; remove ensureRulesFresh call; verify registerTool signature matches MCP SDK
Wire into index.ts at L15-16 (import) and L108-109 (registerExtractKnowledge call)
Author extract-knowledge.test.ts following plan-context.test.ts fixture pattern
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-server test extract-knowledge` to validate; iterate on assertion shape until green
Commit: `feat(server): add fab_extract_knowledge MCP tool with idempotency`

reference.examples: Follow plan-context.ts pure-function service pattern. For idempotency assertion shape copy scan-init.test.ts:202 reruns_are_no_op_with_zero_diff verbatim. For event-emission assertion copy plan-context.test.ts:154-168.

criteria: fab_extract_knowledge tool registered in createFabricServer (index.ts:108-109) — verified by reading file post-edit
extractKnowledge service writes .fabric/knowledge/pending/${type}/${slug}.md with frontmatter omitting `id` field (Q2 late-bind enforced)
Idempotent: 2 calls with same (source_session,type,slug) produce identical idempotency_key + identical pending_path; second call appends evidence section, does NOT overwrite body
knowledge_proposed event appears in events.jsonl with correlation_id=source_session, session_id=source_session, timestamp ISO-8601
knowledge_archive_attempted event emitted when user_messages_summary is empty/whitespace-only
All 4 vitest cases pass: basic write / idempotency / empty extraction / slug sanitization
Per-file coverage ≥90% on services/extract-knowledge.ts and tools/extract-knowledge.ts (verified by TASK-008 parser)

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure-function service + thin tool wrapper following the plan-context.ts/rule-sections.ts canonical pattern verbatim
alternatives_considered: Class-based service with DI container — rejected, no precedent in codebase
Inline registration without separate service file — rejected, plan-context/rule-sections both split tool from service for testability
Hash {triple+body} for content-addressed idempotency — rejected per planning-context Decision (LLM-regenerated summaries make body unstable)
decision_factors: Pre-locked schemas remove all degrees of freedom on input/output shape
Existing test precedent at scan-init.test.ts:202 maps 1:1 to rc.2 idempotency contract
Q2 late-bind decision excludes KnowledgeIdAllocator integration
rationale.tradeoffs: Triple-keyed idempotency (no body hash) means same triple with different LLM-regenerated body appends evidence sections rather than overwriting — chosen for stability over strict content-addressing

manual_checks: Inspect generated pending file: confirm no `id:` line in frontmatter
Inspect events.jsonl: confirm knowledge_proposed event has correlation_id matching source_session input
Re-invoke service with same input: confirm pending file size grows (evidence appended) but pending_path unchanged
success_metrics: Zero new TypeScript strict errors in `pnpm typecheck`
